nodes.name: Pitta
nodes.summary: Pitta（Pitta）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如非洲八色鸫、非洲绿胸八色鸫、蓝翅八色鸫等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Banda Sea pitta
nodes.summary: The Banda Sea pitta or two-striped pitta (Pitta vigorsii) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. References International Ornithological Congress (23 January 2021). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved 23 January 2021.
nodes.shortSummary: The Banda Sea pitta or two-striped pitta (Pitta vigorsii) is a species of bird in the family Pittidae. It is found in Indonesia.

nodes.name: Banda Sea pitta
nodes.summary: Banda Sea pitta（Pitta vigorsii）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Banda Sea pitta。
